text: So there was this DJ who was like kicking off.
I don't know what he was doing, but it was sick, man.
Like, he was like hands in the air.
And then this cat walked in, you know, not like a cat, like a feline cat, like a real, like, you know, like, you know what I'm saying, dog?
Like cats and dogs, it was raining.
It wasn't raining, we were raving.
And I don't know whether he was really saying it.
All he kept saying was eat.
Repeat repeat repeat repeat repeat repeat greasy
